meta.title: 商业伦理与社会责任
meta.description: Advanced native-level discourse on business ethics and CSR in Chinese: idioms, integrity, and formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 격조 높은 원어민 수준의 비즈니스 윤리·사회적 책임 담화: 성어, 신뢰 경영, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「企业社会责任」(qǐyè shèhuì zérèn) means "corporate social responsibility".
explanation.ko: 「企业社会责任」(qǐyè shèhuì zérèn)는 '기업의 사회적 책임'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「企业社会责任」是什么意思？(What does 企业社会责任 mean?)
choices: 企业社会责任(corporate social responsibility)

explanation.en: 「唯利是图」is an idiom meaning "pursuing only profit, regardless of ethics".
explanation.ko: 「唯利是图」는 '오직 이익만을 추구하다'라는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「唯利是图」是什么意思？(What does 唯利是图 mean?)
choices: 唯利是图(pursuing only profit at all costs)

explanation.en: 「诚信经营」(chéngxìn jīngyíng) means "to conduct business with integrity".
explanation.ko: 「诚信经营」(chéngxìn jīngyíng)는 '신뢰를 바탕으로 경영하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 「诚信经营」是什么意思？(What does 诚信经营 mean?)

explanation.en: The balance between profit and ethics is fundamentally a business ethics issue.
explanation.ko: 이익과 도덕의 균형은 근본적으로 비즈니스 윤리 문제이다.

questions.prompt: 「利润与道德的平衡」涉及什么问题？(What issue does 利润与道德的平衡 involve?)
choices: 商业伦理问题(business ethics issues)

explanation.en: 「竭泽而渔」(lit. "draining the pond to catch all the fish") is an idiom for sacrificing long-term sustainability for short-term gain.
explanation.ko: 「竭泽而渔」는 단기 이익을 위해 장기적 지속가능성을 희생하는 것을 뜻하는 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「竭泽而渔」用来比喻什么？(What does 竭泽而渔 metaphorically describe?)
choices: 为了短期利益而破坏长期发展的行为(pursuing short-term gains at the expense of long-term sustainability)

explanation.en: 「企业社会责任」means "corporate social responsibility".
explanation.ko: 「企业社会责任」는 '기업의 사회적 책임'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 越来越多的企业开始重视___，主动承担环保和公益义务。(More and more enterprises are starting to emphasize corporate social responsibility, proactively taking on environmental and charitable obligations.)

explanation.en: 「唯利是图」means "pursuing only profit at all costs".
explanation.ko: 「唯利是图」는 '오직 이익만을 추구하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一些不良商家___，罔顾消费者的权益和安全。(Some unscrupulous merchants pursue only profit, disregarding consumers' rights and safety.)

explanation.en: 「诚信经营」means "honest business practices".
explanation.ko: 「诚信经营」는 '신뢰 경영'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 这家百年老店以___著称，赢得了消费者长久的信赖。(This century-old shop is renowned for honest business practices, earning consumers' long-term trust.)

explanation.en: This item tests recognizing 利润与道德的平衡 as the correct match for the ethical balance concept.
explanation.ko: 이 항목은 '이익과 도덕의 균형' 개념을 인식하는지 테스트한다.

questions.prompt: 如何实现___，是每个企业家都需要认真思考的课题。(How to achieve a balance between profit and morality is a topic every entrepreneur needs to seriously consider.)

explanation.en: 「竭泽而渔」describes sacrificing long-term sustainability for short-term gain.
explanation.ko: 「竭泽而渔」는 단기 이익을 위해 장기적 지속가능성을 희생하는 것을 묘사한다.

questions.prompt: 盲目追求短期利润而破坏环境，无异于___。(Blindly pursuing short-term profit while destroying the environment is no different from "draining the pond to catch all the fish.")

explanation.en: 「暴露」means "to expose/reveal".
explanation.ko: 「暴露」는 '드러내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这家企业的丑闻___了商业伦理缺失所带来的严重后果。(This enterprise's scandal exposed the serious consequences of a lack of business ethics.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味追求短期利润，___不如着眼于企业的长远发展和社会声誉。(Rather than blindly pursuing short-term profit, it's better to focus on the enterprise's long-term development and social reputation.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 企业___规模再大，___不能违背基本的商业道德底线。(No matter how large a company is, it still cannot violate the basic bottom line of business ethics.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 这家企业之所以能够长盛不衰，___是因为它始终坚持诚信为本的经营理念。(The reason this enterprise has been able to thrive for so long is precisely because it has always upheld the business philosophy of putting integrity first.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一家企业一旦失去消费者的信任，___很难在市场上重新立足。(Once a company loses consumers' trust, it becomes hard to regain its footing in the market.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，商业伦理的核心___在于诚信与责任。(In the final analysis, the core of business ethics still lies in integrity and responsibility.)

explanation.en: 「实际上」(shíjìshàng) means "actually/in fact".
explanation.ko: 「实际上」(shíjìshàng)는 '실제로'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，企业的长远利益与社会责任___是相辅相成的，而非对立的。(From this we can see that a company's long-term interests and social responsibility complement each other, rather than being opposed.)

explanation.en: 「越来越」means "more and more".
explanation.ko: 「越来越」는 '점점 더'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，消费者___倾向于支持那些具有社会责任感的品牌。(As everyone knows, consumers are increasingly inclined to support brands with a sense of social responsibility.)

explanation.en: 「找到」(zhǎodào) means "to find".
explanation.ko: 「找到」(zhǎodào)는 '찾아내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这家企业___了利润与道德之间的微妙平衡，值得同行借鉴。(This enterprise found a delicate balance between profit and morality, worth other companies learning from.)

explanation.en: 「开始」(kāishǐ) means "to begin".
explanation.ko: 「开始」(kāishǐ)는 '시작하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这起丑闻让公众对企业的诚信___产生了严重质疑。(This scandal caused the public to seriously question the company's integrity.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 着眼于〜: 不如着眼于 (not 着眼于不如).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '着眼于〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如着眼于'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味追求短期利润，着眼于不如企业的长远发展和社会声誉。(Rather than blindly pursuing short-term profit, it's better to focus on the enterprise's long-term development and social reputation.) — find the error
choices: 与其一味追求短期利润，不如着眼于企业的长远发展和社会声誉。
与其一味追求短期利润，着眼于不如企业的长远发展和社会声誉。
与其一味追求短期利润，不如企业的长远发展和社会声誉着眼于。
与其一味追求短期利润，企业的着眼于不如长远发展和社会声誉。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 这家企业之所以能够长盛不衰，因为是它始终坚持诚信为本的经营理念。(The reason this enterprise has been able to thrive for so long is precisely because it has always upheld the business philosophy of putting integrity first.) — find the error
choices: 这家企业之所以能够长盛不衰，是因为它始终坚持诚信为本的经营理念。
这家企业之所以能够长盛不衰，因为是它始终坚持诚信为本的经营理念。
这家企业之所以能够长盛不衰，是它因为始终坚持诚信为本的经营理念。
这家企业之所以能够长盛不衰，它是因为始终坚持诚信为本的经营理念。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not fit here because it implies a delayed condition rather than the direct consequence 一旦 implies.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며, 「才」는 '一旦'이 나타내는 직접적 결과와 어울리지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一家企业一旦失去消费者的信任，很难才在市场上重新立足。(Once a company loses consumers' trust, it becomes hard to regain its footing in the market.) — find the error
choices: 一家企业一旦失去消费者的信任，就很难在市场上重新立足。
一家企业一旦失去消费者的信任，很难才在市场上重新立足。
一家企业一旦失去消费者的信任，才很难在市场上重新立足。
一家企业一旦失去消费者的信任，很难在市场上才重新立足。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其一味追求短期利润，不如着眼于企业的长远发展和社会声誉 ("Rather than blindly pursuing short-term profit, it's better to focus on the enterprise's long-term development and social reputation").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其一味追求短期利润，不如着眼于企业的长远发展和社会声誉' (단기 이익만 좇느니 차라리 기업의 장기적 발전과 사회적 평판에 주목하는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味追求短期利润，__________企业的长远发展和社会声誉。(Rather than blindly pursuing short-term profit, it's better to focus on the enterprise's long-term development and social reputation.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一家企业一旦失去消费者的信任，就很难在市场上重新立足 ("Once a company loses consumers' trust, it becomes hard to regain its footing in the market").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一家企业一旦失去消费者的信任，就很难在市场上重新立足' (기업은 일단 소비자의 신뢰를 잃으면 시장에서 다시 자리 잡기 어려워진다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一家企业一旦失去消费者的信任，__________在市场上重新立足。(Once a company loses consumers' trust, it becomes hard to regain its footing in the market.)
